chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 882 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.02.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Muhammad Azhar Arain, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. -------- After hearing the learned counsel for the parties at some length learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner would be satisfied and shall not press this constitution petition if the petitioner is allowed to file proceedings for his pre-mature acquittal before the trial court for redressal of his grievances as according to him in this matter the learned trial court has taken the cognizance. Learned A.A.G. & A.P.G. has raised their no objection on the above proposition. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of. However, the petitioners would be at liberty to file any application with regard to pre- mature acquittal of the petitioner before the trial court and trial court on filing such proceedings shall decide the same after hearing the parties in accordance with law. Office is directed to immediately send the copy of this order to the trial court for information. JUDGE JUDGE A.
